records.m_Talk_ENG: These things are persistent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These things are persistent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These things are persistent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Another one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Another one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's a smaller one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's a smaller one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's a smaller one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eek! It fired at us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eek! It fired at us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eek! It fired at us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It didn't shoot at us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It didn't shoot at us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It didn't shoot at us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must have been one we couldn't see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must have been one we couldn't see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must have been one we couldn't see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chris?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chris?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chris?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chris! And there are others with you too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chris! And there are others with you too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chris! And there are others with you too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You came from another ship! How's your side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You came from another ship! How's your side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You came from another ship! How's your side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That wasn't me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That wasn't me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That wasn't me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole Primer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...At the very least...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...At the very least...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...At the very least...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fortunate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's fortunate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's fortunate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope they're safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope they're safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope they're safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. That's why we came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. That's why we came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. That's why we came here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Yes! We'll do
8g

Yes! We'll do
8g

Yes! We'll do

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chris?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chris?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chris?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're in high spirits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're in high spirits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're in high spirits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think you can defeat me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think you can defeat me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think you can defeat me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yoo Mina!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yoo Mina!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yoo Mina!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then next is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then next is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then next is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I shot her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I shot her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I shot her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She moved?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She moved?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She moved?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was a pretty good shot at my head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was a pretty good shot at my head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was a pretty good shot at my head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But something like that isn't enough to kill me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But something like that isn't enough to kill me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But something like that isn't enough to kill me.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
She vanished
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
She vanished
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
She vanished
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Behind us?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Behind us?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Behind us?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't forget, Horizon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't forget, Horizon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't forget, Horizon.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We
8v I made you because
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We
8v I made you because
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're back, boss!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're back, boss!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're back, boss!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ... Cold...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ... Cold...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ... Cold...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ri... ta...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ri... ta...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ri... ta...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want... to go home...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want... to go home...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want... to go home...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then your subconscious must have called me here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then your subconscious must have called me here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then your subconscious must have called me here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really believe ghosts exist?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really believe ghosts exist?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really believe ghosts exist?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a long question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a long question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a long question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said, she is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said, she is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, she is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a monster that looks like the kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a monster that looks like the kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a monster that looks like the kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Human, what are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Human, what are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Human, what are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah, excuse me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ah, excuse me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ah, excuse me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... So you don't need them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... So you don't need them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... So you don't need them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, the heating's back on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, the heating's back on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, the heating's back on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is sufficient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is sufficient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is sufficient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These things are persistent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These things are persistent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These things are persistent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Coming back again and again like this is pretty unfair.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought they'd eventually hit their limit if we kept smashing them, but there's no sign of that at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And more of them keep gathering too... We're going to be at a disadvantage soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, something's coming from that direction too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Another one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Another one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Another one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't look like it. The stride seems a bit short.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's a smaller one...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's a smaller one...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's a smaller one...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eek! It fired at us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eek! It fired at us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eek! It fired at us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tsk, landing a shot through this snowstorm...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. It didn't shoot at us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. It didn't shoot at us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. It didn't shoot at us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? Then what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? Then what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Then what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It shot the doll that was aiming at Noelle from behind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Since when was there a puppet behind me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are footprints, so it didn't fly or teleport in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There must have been one we couldn't see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There must have been one we couldn't see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There must have been one we couldn't see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hate invisible ones more than flying ones.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is everyone all right?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is everyone all right?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is everyone all right?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chris?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chris?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chris?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chris! And there are others with you too!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chris! And there are others with you too!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chris! And there are others with you too!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You came from another ship! How's your side?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You came from another ship! How's your side?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You came from another ship! How's your side?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We landed safely with Lieutenant General Antonov's help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to the operation plan, half our personnel were supposed to rendezvous with Coffin, but most stayed behind to hold back the incoming dolls.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand. It couldn't have been easy getting here while pushing through dolls that keep reviving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that was impressive. Hitting something you couldn't even see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That wasn't me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That wasn't me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That wasn't me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Holy Curia exorcist came with us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An exorcist...? You mean that person in the full-body latex?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... I didn't expect you to remember me by my outfit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole Primer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you detect the puppets using that glowing pendulum?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! I didn't know it myself, but when puppets are nearby, it points in their direction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? You didn't know what it was for yourself...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... It's originally Holy Curia-issued equipment for locating demons, so...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then does that mean those puppets fall within Holy Curia's classification of demons?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...At the very least...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...At the very least...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...At the very least...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It clearly shows me the enemies I'm meant to face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Lieutenant General Antonov said Nicole Primer's pendulum would be helpful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's fortunate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's fortunate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's fortunate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With that pendulum, we should be able to avoid unnecessary engagements with the puppets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... you don't have any news from the other ships either?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. But since the Maze Division Commander stepped in, there shouldn't be any casualties from the crash landings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though with these puppets buried in the snow, it won't be easy for them to come help us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope they're safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope they're safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope they're safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for that to happen, ending this battle is our top priority.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. That's why we came here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. That's why we came here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. That's why we came here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll defeat the Demon Lord and bring those two back safely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong all of a sudden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're in high spirits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're in high spirits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're in high spirits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think you can defeat me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think you can defeat me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think you can defeat me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Yoo Mina!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yoo Mina!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Then next is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then next is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I shot her!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I shot her!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I shot her!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...She moved?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...She moved?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...She moved?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was a pretty good shot at my head.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was a pretty good shot at my head.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was a pretty good shot at my head.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But something like that isn't enough to kill me.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
She vanished
8g

She vanished
8g

She vanished

root.m_Talk_ENG: Behind us?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Behind us?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Behind us?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Step back. It's not your turn to step in yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you were planning to conserve your strength. Are you stepping forward already?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's because you seem to be underestimating me too much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surely that ordinary woman isn't important enough... for you to turn your back on me, is she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't forget, Horizon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't forget, Horizon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't forget, Horizon.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
We
8v I made you because
8v

We

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're back, boss!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're back, boss!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're back, boss!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, we really do look like sisters here, boss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ... Cold...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ... Cold...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ... Cold...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ri... ta...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ri... ta...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ri... ta...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want... to go home...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want... to go home...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want... to go home...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You still haven't erased that scene from your mind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who talks about protecting humanity, you're carrying around such a small nightmare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who said you could appear here as you pleased?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a space where I organize my memory with minimal processing power. In other words, my private dream.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then your subconscious must have called me here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then your subconscious must have called me here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then your subconscious must have called me here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're going to sit around in my space without permission, at least pay rent, you cyber ghost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really believe ghosts exist?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really believe ghosts exist?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really believe ghosts exist?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Since there's one in my memory right now, I suppose I'll acknowledge it halfway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, there are plenty of strange phenomena in this world that can't be explained by ordinary logic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like that Thagirion who looks like the kid showing up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dash... doesn't resemble that kind of wraith trying to destroy the world in the slightest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: People can change depending on the environment they're placed in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dash grew up in harsher conditions than most humans. Even so, she was kind enough to show goodwill to people she didn't even know well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The kid stayed kind until the very last moment you saw her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... if the kid had survived after going through such a terrible betrayal, would she still have remained that kind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?
root.m_Talk_DEU: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?
root.m_Talk_FRA: After learning what tragedy her kindness caused... could you really be sure she would still remain the same innocent person?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a long question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a long question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a long question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to use the free version, please keep it shorter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to answer. Just engrave one thing into that narrow little data memory of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what you end up seeing in the Demon Lord, don't hesitate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said, she is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said, she is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, she is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just a monster that looks like the kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just a monster that looks like the kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just a monster that looks like the kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Human, what are you doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Human, what are you doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Human, what are you doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah, excuse me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ah, excuse me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ah, excuse me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ship's heating system broke down, so I thought I'd at least bring you a blanket.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's not enough, I also have hand warmers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here, I'll include a Sun Charm that gives off warmth too. The first one is free.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those are only temporary measures. Solutions far removed from the root cause.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha... So you don't need them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha... So you don't need them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha... So you don't need them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reboot complete. Indoor maintenance system activated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, the heating's back on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, the heating's back on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, the heating's back on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The filter wasn't broken. There was just an error in the system's self-diagnostics, so it should function properly now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow... you fixed it up in no time just by touching it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Horizon, you're really amazing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you heading out? The doctor said it would take half a day to fully recharge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is sufficient.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is sufficient.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is sufficient.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go deal with the root cause of this extreme cold.
